one_line_summary: Godot CI and release evidence tools for maintainers reviewing exports, mobile readiness, localization, save migrations, runtime telemetry, screenshots, and release dashboards.
repository_description: Godot CI and release evidence tools for maintainers.

tools.name: godot-production-doctor
tools.role: Installable umbrella package that provides the godot-production-doctor command and historical godot-project-doctor alias for CI and release evidence guidance, planning, profile checklists, Markdown first-run plans, running, and summarizing the suite.

tools.name: godot-ci-doctor-action
tools.role: GitHub composite action wrapper for Godot CI and release evidence checks.

tools.name: godot-release-dashboard-action
tools.role: GitHub composite action wrapper for building release dashboard artifacts from existing toolkit reports.

tools.name: godot-asset-pipeline-doctor
tools.role: PNG and Godot .import checks for pixel art and mobile memory risks.

tools.name: godot-content-graph-doctor
tools.role: Data-driven content id, reference, and numeric outlier validation.

tools.name: godot-export-preset-doctor
tools.role: Release-readiness, target matrix, preset diff, leak-risk, and exported artifact checks.

tools.name: gdscript-api-comment-coverage
tools.role: Public GDScript API documentation and coverage gate.

tools.name: godot-gdscript-architecture-guard
tools.role: GDScript module boundary, module owner summary, autoload access, dependency graph, high fan-in/fan-out file, possible unused script/resource, and architecture policy checks.

tools.name: godot-input-map-auditor
tools.role: Input coverage and duplicate binding checks.

tools.name: godot-localization-qa-guard
tools.role: CSV/PO translation checks, project key usage scan, localization stress-pack generation, and capture planning.

tools.name: godot-save-schema-guard
tools.role: Save fixture generation, schema validation, migration-chain checks, before-and-after migration comparison, final migrated-output validation, and fixture redaction.

tools.name: godot-scenario-report-kit
tools.role: Scenario run evidence validation from JSON or JUnit XML, manifests, coverage checks, flake and retry grouping, evidence bundles, telemetry summaries, visual summaries, log summaries, and baseline comparison.

tools.name: godot-scene-signal-auditor
tools.role: Scene signal connection, scene contract, contract diff, node group, exported property, and autoload coupling analysis.

tools.name: godot-visual-smoke-test-kit
tools.role: Visual smoke plan, screenshot diff, and approval helpers.

tools.name: godot-mobile-perf-doctor
tools.role: Static mobile performance evidence checks for Godot projects, including renderer, viewport, stretch, texture, and safe-area evidence handoff checks.

tools.name: godot-mobile-ui-doctor
tools.role: Mobile UI metadata checks for safe areas, touch targets, spacing, text overflow, localized layout risk, and overlay previews.

tools.name: godot-pack-mod-doctor
tools.role: Pack, DLC, mod, and patch manifest generation, validation, moved-resource diffing, content-id, dependency, load-order, security policy checks, and rule metadata.

tools.name: godot-release-dashboard-kit
tools.role: Workflow-filtered static dashboard builder for toolkit reports, typed report highlights, visual artifacts, scenario evidence, retry evidence, export artifact evidence, report metadata, reproduction commands, compact telemetry summaries, and previous-run trends.

tools.name: godot-runtime-telemetry-lab
tools.role: Runtime telemetry adapters, summaries, timeline reports, named budgets, frame budget checks, frame/memory baseline comparisons, and rule metadata.

tools.name: pixel-space-asset-toolkit
tools.role: Deterministic pixel sci-fi asset generation and cleanup utilities.

ci_and_maintenance.tests: unittest suites in every Python tool plus root project checks

current_limitations: Some specialized tools require project-specific fixtures or visual smoke capture scripts to be fully useful.
The tools are intentionally narrow and production-focused rather than a broad Godot framework.
The umbrella CLI is distributed as godot-production-doctor and installs the godot-project-doctor command.
release_priorities: Maintain one public umbrella repository with all tools and the GitHub Actions.
Keep tagged releases tied to passing CI runs.

Maintain the published packages first: godot-production-doctor, godot-asset-pipeline-doctor, godot-export-preset-doctor, godot-mobile-perf-doctor, godot-content-graph-doctor, godot-scenario-report-kit, godot-gdscript-architecture-guard, godot-runtime-telemetry-lab, godot-pack-mod-doctor, and godot-release-dashboard-kit.
Use concise examples and minimal fixtures when discussing issues or improvements.
